description: Report visualization enhancement: professional styled report rendering in dashboard with download support (PDF-like HTML, Markdown download)
steps: Enhance the report display in dashboard/templates/stocks.html: (1) When a deep report is generated, render it using the existing renderReportMarkdown() function but add professional styling: section dividers, colored score badges, signal gauges (SVG arc), executive summary card with key metrics prominently displayed. (2) Add a report header with ticker, date, overall signal badge, score gauge. (3) Style the agent voting table with colored signal indicators. (4) Add collapsible sections for each school of thought (value/growth/macro/quant).

Add report download functionality: (1) 'Download as Markdown' button (already partially exists - ensure it works cleanly). (2) 'Download as HTML' button that generates a self-contained HTML file with inline CSS (dark theme) that users can save/print. (3) 'Copy Report' button to copy full markdown to clipboard.
Add a dedicated /report/{ticker} page route that shows a full-page professional report view (not embedded in stocks page). This gives a clean URL for sharing.
Ensure the report rendering handles all edge cases: missing data gracefully shows '--', long reasoning text is properly truncated with expand/collapse.
acceptance_criteria: Report in stocks.html renders with professional styling (section dividers, colored badges, score gauge)
Download as HTML generates self-contained styled file
Copy Report copies full markdown to clipboard
